creator: olce@FreeBSD.org
text:
This new compile option makes Universal Ctags read a global configuration file (at ${LOCALBASE}/etc/ctags.conf) before the user's one.  This is useful to apply some common configuration to all users, who can then tweak whichever part they want in their own file.

Patch to be attached after bug creation.  Please apply with 'git am'.

Thanks.
